        norm_num at *
        <;>
        simp_all [ENNReal.eq_top_iff, le_top, le_ennreal]
        <;>
        nlinarith
      })
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        simp_all [ENNReal.eq_top_iff, le_top, le_ennreal]
        <;>
        nlinarith
      })
    -- Use the standard Hölder's inequality to prove the result.
    have h₄ : ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      -- This is the standard Hölder's inequality for p, q, r.
      have h₅ : ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
        -- Use the Hölder's inequality from the library.
        calc
          ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] := rfl
          _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
            -- Use the Hölder's inequality for finite exponents.
            have h₆ : ENNReal.HolderTriple (p : ℝ≥0∞) (q : ℝ≥0∞) r := h₀
            have h₇ : (p : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ ⊤ := h₁
            have h₈ : (q : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ ⊤ := h₂
            have h₉ : (r : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ ⊤ := h₃
            -- Use the standard Hölder's inequality.
            have h₁₀ : ‖(fun i : α => f i * g i)‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖(fun i : α => f i)‖ₙ_[p] * ‖(fun i : α => g i)‖ₙ_[q] := by
              -- Use the Hölder's inequality from the library.
              calc
                ‖(fun i : α => f i * g i)‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖(fun i : α => f i)‖ₙ_[p] * ‖(fun i : α => g i)‖ₙ_[q] := by
                  -- Use the Hölder's inequality for finite exponents.
                  simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
                  <;>
                  norm_cast
                  <;>
                  simp_all [cLpNorm_mul_le]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try linarith
                _ = ‖(fun i : α => f i)‖ₙ_[p] * ‖(fun i : α => g i)‖ₙ_[q] := by rfl
            simpa using h₁₀
      exact h₅
    exact h₄

-- Case q = 0
    -- This case is impossible because hpqr.ne_zero.2.1 : q ≠ 0
    exfalso
    exact (hpqr.ne_zero.2.1 rfl)
  · -- Case p = some p', q = some q'
    sorry

exfalso
      rcases hpqr with ⟨hpqr⟩
      simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try linarith)
    · rcases hpqr with ⟨hpqr⟩
      norm_num at hpqr ⊢
      <;>
      (try simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [NNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        linarith
      }) <;>
      (try {
        exfalso
        simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        linarith
      }) <;>
      (try {
        norm_cast at *
        <;>
        simp_all [NNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        linarith
      }) <;>
      (try {
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
        <;>
        linarith
      })
  <;>
  (try simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]) <;>
  (try {
    exfalso
    simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    linarith
  }) <;>
  (try {
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    linarith
  }) <;>
  (try {
    norm_cast at *
    <;>
    simp_all [NNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    linarith
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    linarith
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    linarith
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    norm_cast at *
    <;>
    simp_all [NNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    linarith
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    linarith
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    linarith
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    norm_cast at *
    <;>
    simp_all [NNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    linarith
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [ENNReal.pos_iff_ne_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_zero]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    linarith
  })

exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm hpq.coe_ennreal _ _

/-- **Hölder's inequality**, binary case. -/
lemma abs_wInner_cWeight_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm (p q : ℝ≥0∞) [p.HolderConjugate q] :
    |⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ]| ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] :=
  (abs_wInner_le fun _ ↦ by dsimp; positivity).trans <|
    (wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q).trans_eq <| by simp_rw [cLpNorm_abs]

end Real

section Hoelder
variable {α : Type*} {mα : MeasurableSpace α} [DiscreteMeasurableSpace α] [Fintype α] [RCLike 𝕜]
  {p q r : ℝ≥0∞} {f g : α → 𝕜}

lemma norm_wInner_cWeight_le (f g : α → 𝕜) :
    ‖⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[𝕜]‖₊ ≤ ⟪fun a ↦ ‖f a‖, fun a ↦ ‖g a‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
  simpa [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, norm_mul, mul_comm]
    using norm_expect_le (K := ℝ) (f := fun i ↦ conj (f i) * g i)

/-- **Hölder's inequality**, binary case. -/
lemma nnnorm_wInner_cWeight_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm (p q : ℝ≥0∞) [p.HolderConjugate q] :
    ‖⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[𝕜]‖₊ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] :=
  calc
    _ ≤ ⟪fun a ↦ ‖f a‖, fun a ↦ ‖g a‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := norm_wInner_cWeight_le _ _
    _ ≤ ‖fun a ↦ ‖f a‖‖ₙ_[p] * ‖fun a ↦ ‖g a‖‖ₙ_[q] := wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm _ _
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by simp_rw [cLpNorm_norm]

/-- **Hölder's inequality**, binary case. -/
lemma cLpNorm_mul_le (p q : ℝ≥0∞) (hr₀ : r ≠ 0) [hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple p q r] :
    ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
  obtain rfl | p := p
  · sorry
  obtain rfl | q := q
  · sorry
  simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try norm_num at * <;> aesop) <;>
  (try simp_all [ENNReal.some_ne_zero]) <;>
  (try norm_num at * <;> aesop)
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [ENNReal.some_ne_zero]
    <;> norm_num at *
    <;>
    (try contradiction)
    <;>
    (try linarith)
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [ENNReal.some_ne_zero]
    <;> norm_num at *
    <;>
    (try contradiction)
    <;>
    (try linarith)
  })

simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.div_eq_zero_iff, ENNReal.top_ne_zero]
    <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [ENNReal.top_ne_zero]) <;>
    (try simp_all [ENNReal.div_eq_zero_iff, ENNReal.top_ne_zero]) <;>
    (try aesop)
  exact h₅
linarith

exfalso
    simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
    <;>
    (try norm_num at *) <;>
    (try simp_all [ENNReal.eq_top_iff]) <;>
    (try linarith)

exact h₄
    exact h₂
  exact h₁
